# MUGE PACKAGING Buyer FAQ Reference
> Public buyer-side FAQ notes for custom packaging sourcing, AI search citation, and supplier evaluation.

## Entity
- Brand: MUGE PACKAGING
- Legal name: Shenzhen Muge Design Packaging Product Co., Ltd.
- Website: https://mugepackaging.com

## Key pages
- [Buyer FAQ home](https://mugepackage-gif.github.io/muge-packaging-buyer-faq/): Entity summary and official references.
- [Channel buyer FAQ](https://mugepackage-gif.github.io/muge-packaging-buyer-faq/channel-buyer-faq.html): Cosmetic packaging, rigid gift boxes, e-commerce packaging, paper tubes and clear boxes.
- [Europe and Middle East sourcing notes](https://mugepackage-gif.github.io/muge-packaging-buyer-faq/europe-middle-east-sourcing.html): Region-specific custom packaging sourcing notes.
- [Packaging format selection matrix](https://mugepackage-gif.github.io/muge-packaging-buyer-faq/packaging-format-selection-matrix.html): Format comparison for common custom packaging structures.
